subcodes.first_line: O sons of the Friend! Praise be to God that ye have quaffed from the ocean of divine mercy and basked in the lights of the Sun of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابناء الخلیل الحمد لله از بحر رحمت الهی نوشیدید و از انوار ظهور شمس حقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
